item.title: About me
item.description: I’m passionate about mathematics and its applications to physics and computer science. I’ve recently finished my MSc Degree in Mathematics at Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon, under the supervision of John Huerta. Contact me at: email: rui at ruimp.com github: github.com/ruimp linkedin: linkedin.com/in/ruimpxt Research Interests derived geometry operads and higher strucutres factorization algebras homotopy Lie algebras supergeometry (shifted) Poisson geometry (topological) quantum field theory Education Master of Science in Applied Mathematics and Computation - IST, Lisbon - 2021 | 2023
